summary: Wave of downgrades in April 2026: CICC cut to market perform (PT $58 from $69), DA Davidson cut to neutral (PT $46 from $72), UBS neutral (PT $54 from $58), Wells Fargo overweight (PT $55 from $65), Stifel hold (PT $56 from $65). Barclays upgrade to Overweight in March (PT $73). NKE hit new 52-week low on Apr 7 after CICC downgrade (-3.1%). Consensus: Moderate Buy, avg PT ~$63.25.
